gpt55_review_summary: Initial GPT-5.5 review found planned probe output collisions, incomplete backend coverage when auto-feeding release evidence, and empty metadata-key acceptance. I added construction-time validation and regressions for all three, reran focused/full tests and build, and re-review returned clean.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_benchmark_plan.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py
GPT-5.5 review found output-collision, incomplete-backend, and metadata-key validation findings; all fixed and re-review returned clean
what_changed: Added planned native vLLM/SGLang engine-probe commands to V1 benchmark plans.
Allowed release evidence plan validation to consume planned engine-probe output paths automatically.
Added CLI flags for backend-keyed handoff, probe factory, output, payload, engine version, and metadata options.
why: The V1 release plan should produce benchmark, storage, native engine-probe, and release-evidence artifacts reproducibly instead of requiring engine probe JSONs to be created out of band.
